context.audience: Python developers building web applications, data scientists adding web interfaces to ML projects, startups choosing Django for rapid prototyping with its batteries-included philosophy
pain_points: Async support adoption and mixing sync/async code in Django views
Scaling Django beyond monolithic architecture with microservices or ASGI
Integrating AI/ML models into Django's request-response cycle
Django REST Framework vs FastAPI for building APIs
Frontend integration decisions with Django templates vs SPA frameworks
monetization: Course and training content for Python developers
